Off Calendar Jun-03-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Continued To Jun-06-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-542533, CGC-15-545295, CGC-15-543931, CGC-15-544124, CGC-15-544172, CGC-15-544579, CGC-15-545217, CGC-15-545377 WITH CASE CGC-14-538414
Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. WILLIAM S. HOANG OF CUMMINS & WHITE LLP, TEL. NO. 1-949-852-1800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT COMPANION SPECIALTY INSURANCE BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WEBCOR CONSTRUCTION LP'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-542533, CGC-15-545295, CGC-15-543931, CGC-15-544124, CGC-15-544172, CGC-15-544579, CGC-15-545217, CGC-15-545377 WITH CASE CGC-14-538414 is Granted. Cases: CGC-14-542533, CGC-15-545295, CGC-15-543931, CGC-15-544124, CGC-15-544172, CGC-15-544579, CGC-15-545217, CGC-15-545377 shall be consolidated into lead case CGC-14-538414 for all purposes. Trial shall be continued to June 6, 2016. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
